name: integrate-routed-review-backends
title: Consolidate review command surface and routed backends
description: Replace sd-full-check, sd-review-local, and sd-review-pr with a clean deterministic check surface and one unified exact-scope review lifecycle spanning local providers, routed Copilot, and external backends, with no aliases or legacy configuration readers.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Planning complete pending final user review. Public names, fix defaults, provider-failure behavior, mutation boundaries, and optional missing-router fallback are approved. Optional remote=auto degrades without prompting only when the router is truly absent; explicit/required remote review stops early, and broken or ambiguous state fails closed. Every new PR head gets a distinct router decision and receipt; a bookkeeping-only successor may route to none only through router auto policy, never through a command-pack-local exemption. The router remains noninteractive and no-checkout. Non-PR review is worktree-only; PR review pushes intended verified fix rounds. The cutover also replaces package.json check:full with versioned check config. Remote consumption depends on platypeeps/sd-github-review task 07-22-publish-routed-review-receipt-contract.
